components.author: OWASP Foundation
components.name: cyclonedx-maven-plugin
components.description: CycloneDX Maven plugin

component.name: opencgmes-reactor
component.description: Aggregator pom for building all OpenCGMES modules together.

components.name: cimxml
components.description: IEC 61970-552 CIMXML parser based on Apache Jena

components.name: jena-arq
components.description: SPARQL 1.1 query engine and RDF parsers for Apache Jena

components.name: jena-core
components.description: Jena is a Java framework for building Semantic Web applications. It provides a programmatic environment for RDF, RDFS and OWL, SPARQL and includes a rule-based inference engine.

components.name: jena-base
components.description: This module contains non-RDF library code and the common system runtime.

components.name: commons-csv
components.description: The Apache Commons CSV library provides a simple interface for reading and writing CSV files of various types.

components.name: commons-codec
components.description: The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

components.name: commons-compress
components.description: Apache Commons Compress defines an API for working with compression and archive formats. These include bzip2, gzip, pack200, LZMA, XZ, Snappy, traditional Unix Compress, DEFLATE, DEFLATE64, LZ4, Brotli, Zstandard and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump, 7z, arj.

components.name: commons-collections4
components.description: The Apache Commons Collections package contains types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

components.name: caffeine
components.description: A high performance caching library

components.name: jspecify
components.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

components.name: collection
components.description: Persistent (immutable) collection library

components.name: jena-iri3986
components.description: The IRI module provides an implementation of the IRI and URI specifications (RFC 3987 and 3986).

components.name: jena-iri
components.description: The IRI module provides an implementation of the IRI and URI specifications (RFC 3987 and 3986) which are used across Jena in order to comply with relevant W3C specifications for RDF and SPARQL which require conformance to these specifications.

components.name: jena-langtag
components.description: Implementation of RFC 5646 (BCP-47) Language tags

components.name: RoaringBitmap
components.description: Roaring bitmaps are compressed bitmaps (also called bitsets) which tend to outperform conventional compressed bitmaps such as WAH or Concise.

components.name: gson
components.description: Gson JSON library

components.name: error_prone_annotations
components.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

components.name: titanium-json-ld
components.description: A JSON-LD 1.1 Processor & API

components.name: titanium-jcs
components.description: An implementation of the RFC 8785 JSON Canonicalization Scheme (JCS) specification in Java, utilizing Jakarta JSON Processing.

components.name: titanium-rdf-api
components.description: A collection of straightforward interfaces for processing RDF statements and facilitating seamless interoperability and data exchange across various libraries.

components.name: titanium-rdf-n-quads
components.description: A Java implementation of a streaming RDF N-Quads reader and writer, optimized for efficient parsing, serialization, and handling of large RDF datasets. It enables scalable processing of RDF statements in a memory-efficient, streaming fashion. Formerly a part of Titanium JSON-LD.

components.name: jakarta.json
components.description: Default provider for Jakarta JSON Processing

license.name: GNU General Public License, version 2 with the GNU Classpath Exception

components.name: protobuf-java
components.description: Core Protocol Buffers library. Protocol Buffers are a way of encoding structured data in an efficient yet extensible format.

components.name: libthrift
components.description: Thrift is a software framework for scalable cross-language services development.

components.name: stax2-api
components.description: Stax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.

components.name: aalto-xml
components.description: Ultra-high performance non-blocking XML processor (Stax/Stax2, SAX/SAX2)

components.name: woodstox-core
components.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

components.name: commons-io
components.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

components.name: commons-lang3
components.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang. The code is tested using the latest revision of the JDK for supported LTS releases: 8, 11, 17 and 21 currently. See https://github.com/apache/commons-lang/blob/master/.github/workflows/maven.yml Please ensure your build environment is up-to-date and kindly report any build issues.

components.name: slf4j-api
components.description: The slf4j API

components.name: jcl-over-slf4j
components.description: JCL 1.2 implemented over SLF4J

components.name: log4j-slf4j2-impl
components.description: SLF4J 2 provider (binding) for the Apache Log4j API. It forwards SLF4J 2 calls to the Log4j API. This effectively allows using Log4j as an implementation of SLF4J 2. (Refer to the `log4j-to-slf4j` artifact for forwarding the Log4j API to SLF4J.)

components.name: log4j-api
components.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

components.name: log4j-core
components.description: A versatile, industrial-grade, and reference implementation of the Log4j API. It bundles a rich set of components to assist various use cases: Appenders targeting files, network sockets, databases, SMTP servers; Layouts that can render CSV, HTML, JSON, Syslog, etc. formatted outputs; Filters that can be configured using log event rates, regular expressions, scripts, time, etc. It contains several extension points to introduce custom components, if needed.

components.name: cimvocabcheck-core
components.description: Static SPARQL/SHACL validation against RDFS/CIM profile schemas.

components.name: cimvocabcheck-cli
components.description: Command-line tool for validating SPARQL queries and SHACL shapes against CIM/CGMES schema profiles.

components.name: picocli
components.description: Java command line parser with both an annotations API and a programmatic API. Usage help with ANSI styles and colors. Autocomplete. Nested subcommands. Easily included as source to avoid adding a dependency.

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: cimvocabcheck-lsp
components.description: LSP language server for validating SPARQL queries and SHACL shapes against CIM/CGMES schema profiles.

components.name: org.eclipse.lsp4j
components.description: Java bindings for the Language Server Protocol

components.name: org.eclipse.lsp4j.jsonrpc
components.description: Generic JSON-RPC implementation

components.name: cimvocabcheck-reactor
components.description: Aggregator pom for the OpenCGMES CIMVocabCheck SPARQL/SHACL validation toolchain.
